===================
===================
===================
=== bd75-10-30a.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 
10/30/75, 
Plymouth, MA, 

1CDR (71min), 

version "a"; has some hiss; talking t2 2:xx plus some occasional more; 
different recording than previous; this one has the hiss but a more natural better 
sounding vocal on first 5 tracks but deteriorates becoming muffled with tape speed 
problems for t6-t9; this version has more of the dylan portion of the show; 

good sound [C]

Tracks 7-9 are actually from a different incomplete poorer tape.

analog cut t5 2:05, t12 6:45; 
hiss spikes t7 0:07, 0:08, t14 3:40 to 4:02; 
only beginning of t9, t15

CD1
1 When I Paint My Masterpiece, 
2 It Ain't Me, Babe, 
3 A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall, 
4 Romance In Durango (Levy/Dylan), 
5 Isis (Dylan/Levy), 
6 The Times They Are A-Changin', 
7 Never Let Me Go (Joseph C Scott), 
8 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll, 
9 I Shall Be Released [cut], 
10 Mr. Tambourine Man, 
11 Oh Sister (Dylan/Levy), 
12 Hurricane (Levy/Dylan) 
13, One More Cup Of Coffee (Valley Below) 
14 Sara 
15 Just Like A Woman [cut]


File names & tags edited by Chopen, July 2009
